mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for workers compensation denials in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Blair Jones at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in workers compensation denials serving West Valley City. Blair focuses 100% of his time helping injured workers and achieves great results working with his clients against insurance companies and their lawyers. He has successfully represented numerous injured workers in complex workers’ compensation claims, criminal defendants in high profile crimes, and children and parents in protective services removals. Contact us at 801-746-0290.
